name: Street Rat
description: You know the merciless streets of cities and villainous hives.

name: Outlaw
description: You're a wanted criminal hiding from jail or worse.

name: Hacker
description: Datanets are no match for you.

name: Operative
description: You have crime syndicate connections, contacts, and debts.

name: Roughneck
description: Mining, hauling, or salvaging, you work hard in extreme environments.

name: Mechanic
description: You can fix and tinker on a device or vehicle.

name: Politician
description: You navigate bureaucracy like some navigate the stars.

name: Fence
description: You can appraise value and know where to find a buyer.

name: Gambler
description: You can never turn down a good bet.

name: Corpo
description: The ways of the corporate world are second nature to you.

name: Mercenary
description: You would fight friend and foe alike for your credits.

name: Pilot
description: Pirate, privateer, or merchant — the stars are yours

name: Acolyte
description: You're well-trained in religious rites and doctrines

name: Soldier
description: You serve as a fighter in an organized army.

name: Ranger
description: The frontier is your true home, surviving on stealth and wits.

name: Scientist
description: You seek discovery through experimentation rather than study.

name: Celebrity
description: You've traveled far with your charm and talent.

name: Academic
description: You know much about a specific area of study.

name: Noble
description: A famous name has opened many doors for you.

name: Medic
description: You know anatomy, surgery, and first aid.
